title: GAIA tool-availability-probe output
description: Single-line JSON object emitted on stdout by plugins/gaia/scripts/tool-availability-probe.sh per ADR-078 / FR-RSV2-18. Exactly three keys; no additional properties. Consumed by adapter contract.bats and (downstream) verdict-resolver.sh after mapping state -> check.status.

state.description: Probe verdict per FR-RSV2-18. available = tool installed + applicable + run.sh exit 0; expected_and_missing = tool declared but not on PATH (BLOCKED); ran_and_errored = adapter run.sh non-zero or timed out (BLOCKED); not_applicable = no matching files in file-list (silent skip).

skip_reason.description: Required (non-null) when state == not_applicable. Null otherwise.

error_detail.description: Required (non-null) when state == ran_and_errored — captures stderr or timeout reason. Null otherwise.
